_comment: Example only — copy to provider_registry.json (gitignored if it holds secrets). Admin edits hierarchy; Developer adds bridge/<provider> when code is required.

google_cloud.hierarchy_notes: AI Studio keys and Vertex OAuth profiles both hang under project nodes; two product blocks in UI (Block A / Block B).

microsoft_azure.hierarchy_notes: Founders Hub grant maps to billing_account; resource group ≈ project; Azure OpenAI deployment endpoint + key ≈ byok.

amazon_aws.hierarchy_notes: AWS Activate credits → billing_account; account/workspace → project; IAM access key pair → byok.

oracle_oci.hierarchy_notes: Always Free tier has no API token BYOK chain — third tier is compute_pool (Ampere CPUs, RAM) not byok. UI shows utilization not $ liquidity.

cursor_pro.hierarchy_notes: Retail subscription — no GCP-style projects. routing_profile captures API-disabled vs custom endpoint.

google_one_ai.hierarchy_notes: Consumer credits deposit — middle tier is credit_pool not project.
